channel.title: vault on David Nguyen's Personal Blog
channel.description: Recent content in vault on David Nguyen's Personal Blog

item.title: Fake Vault AWS Secrets Engine
item.description: Introduction Currently I’m working on a system that’s deployed to Kubernetes and uses Hashicorp Vault AWS Secrets Engine to retrieve temporary credentials from assumed roles when it needs to interact with AWS infrastructure. The system uses a sidecar that’s built on top of vault agent to get AWS credentials as below: In local, the application is deployed to minikube in a very similar way (.i.e. including the vault sidecar, aws infrastructures are replaced with either localstack or moto) so that we can catch issues as early as we can.
